title: Why Transparency Matters
excerpt: In today's world, trust is more valuable than ever...
content: In today's world, trust is more valuable than ever. Companies often make promises they can't keep, and customers are tired of it. At Orchid, we're taking a different approach. We believe in making our promises visible and tracking whether we keep them. This is the foundation of everything we do. When you can see our commitments breaking, you know we're being honest about our failures. And when our pins stay intact, you can be confident we're delivering on our promises.

title: The Story Behind Orchid
excerpt: It all started with a simple question...
content: It all started with a simple question: How can we make trust visible? We looked around at businesses that make grand promises but rarely deliver. We wanted something different. Something where accountability wasn't hidden behind corporate speak. Instead, we built Orchid - a platform where our promises are literally visible, and if we break them, everyone can see it. It's not always comfortable, but it's honest. And honesty is the best foundation for trust.
